source_context: PART 5 - DIVISION 1: GENERAL RULES 43P2016 343.2 Skateboard and Sports Ramps 343.2 (1) All skateboard and sports ramp structures must be located within the maximum envelope dimensions of 1.5 metres high by 5.0 metres wide by 6.0 metres long. (2) More than one structure may be contained within the maximum envelope dimensions referenced in subsection (1). (3) The maximum envelope dimensions referenced in subsection (1) do not include at-grade surfaces such as, but not limited to, soil, grass, wood or concrete. (5) There must only be one skateboard and sports ramp envelope per parcel.
